name: hive-bundler
description: Hive Bundler — Solana token launch suite

scripts.ui:dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,client "ts-node server.ts" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.ui:setup: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.app:dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,vite,electron "ts-node server.ts" "cd client && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && node scripts/launch-electron.js"
scripts.app:build: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run ui:build && npx electron-builder
scripts.app:build:mac: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run ui:build && npx electron-builder --mac
scripts.app:build:win: npm run clean && npm run build:ts && npm run ui:build && npx electron-builder --win

author: https://solana-scripts.com
